content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

October 18, 2002

J. Wilmar Jensen
Jensen & Jensen
1514 H Street
Modesto, CA 95354

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. G-02-281

Dear Mr. Jensen:

This letter is in response to your inquiry regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 As your letter is a request for guidance on the disposal of remaining campaign funds on an unnamed former candidate, we treat it as a general advice request under enclosed regulation 18329(c)(4)(C).

I have included in this mailing a copy of Government Code Section 89519, which addresses your question, along with § 85304 and regulation 18530.4, and a pamphlet entitled, Getting Advice From the FPPC, should you need future assistance from our agency.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosures
JWW:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
